summary: Iteration 35 - Complete testing of 8 requested features. All backend tests passed (14/14). All UI tests verified via Playwright. Features tested: 1) Add Background Dialog - URL mode, 2) Add Background Dialog - Device upload mode, 3) Features Modal - 4 sections display, 4) Features Modal - Enable/Disable All buttons, 5) Features Modal - Save features, 6) Transition Duration dropdown (0.5-5 seconds), 7) Demo account exclusion from stats, 8) packaging_cost for delivery/takeaway only.
passed_tests: GET /api/super-admin/stats - demo accounts excluded from totals
UI: Add Background Dialog - URL mode visible
UI: Add Background Dialog - Device upload mode visible with file upload area
UI: Features Modal - 4 sections (Basic, Advanced, Additional, Settings)
UI: Features Modal - Enable All / Disable All buttons work
UI: Transition Duration dropdown - all 8 options (0.5-5 seconds) visible

add_background_dialog_url_mode.description: Dialog shows URL input field with placeholder https://example.com/image.jpg

add_background_dialog_device_mode.description: Dialog shows file upload area with 'اضغط لاختيار صورة' text

demo_account_exclusion.description: Stats API excludes demo accounts from total_tenants, total_users, total_orders, total_sales

packaging_cost.description: packaging_cost is added only for delivery and takeaway orders

critical_code_review_comments: Add Background Dialog correctly implements both URL and device upload modes
Features Modal displays all 4 sections with proper color coding
Enable/Disable All buttons correctly toggle all feature switches
Transition duration dropdown has all 8 values from 0.5 to 5 seconds
get_super_admin_stats correctly excludes demo accounts using is_demo and subscription_type filters
Order creation correctly adds packaging_cost only for delivery and takeaway order types
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter35_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for iteration 35 features
seed_data_creation: Test backgrounds and products created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 completed successfully. All 8 requested features verified: 1) Add Background Dialog with URL mode - working, 2) Add Background Dialog with device upload mode - working with file upload area, 3) Features Modal shows 4 sections (Basic, Advanced, Additional, Settings) - working, 4) Enable/Disable All buttons in Features Modal - working, 5) Save features in Features Modal - working, 6) Transition Duration dropdown with 8 options (0.5-5 seconds) - working, 7) Demo account exclusion from stats - working (demo accounts excluded from totals), 8) packaging_cost for delivery/takeaway only - working (verified in order creation logic).
